name: Taylor & Francis Group
description: Taylor & Francis Group is a British academic publisher offering REST APIs for searching and accessing journal articles, books, metadata, and bibliographic records from over 2,700 Taylor & Francis and Routledge publications. Their API surfaces include content download APIs for books and chapters, KBART holdings automation for library systems, COUNTER 5 SUSHI usage reporting, and text and data mining access for institutional subscribers across humanities, social sciences, science, technology, and medicine.

itemListElement.name: Taylor & Francis Content API
itemListElement.description: Programmatic access to eBook and chapter downloads via DOI-based identifiers for institutional subscribers.

itemListElement.name: Taylor & Francis KBART Holdings API
itemListElement.description: Automated retrieval and synchronisation of institutional journal and eBook entitlements for library management systems.

itemListElement.name: Taylor & Francis SUSHI / COUNTER 5 API
itemListElement.description: Automated harvesting of COUNTER Release 5 usage statistics via the SUSHI protocol for institutional libraries.

itemListElement.name: Taylor & Francis Text and Data Mining API
itemListElement.description: API-based text and data mining access to subscribed and open-access content for non-commercial research purposes.
